EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface IRasterProps

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control the most common raster properties.

[Guid("4B7B1BD0-A705-11D2-8E30-00A0249480F0")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IRasterProps

Properties

Extent

The extent of the Raster.

IEnvelope Extent { get; set; }

Property Value

IEnvelope

Examples

Sample Snippet

Height

Height in pixels.

int Height { get; set; }

Property Value

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

IsInteger

Indicates if the data is integer.

bool IsInteger { get; }

Property Value

bool

Sample Snippet

MapModel

Map to raster transformation information.

IRasterMapModel MapModel { get; set; }

Property Value

IRasterMapModel

Sample Snippet

NoDataValue

Data value used to indicate invalid or excluded data.

object NoDataValue { get; set; }

Property Value

object

Examples

Sample Snippet

PixelType

Data type of the pixels.

rstPixelType PixelType { get; set; }

Property Value

rstPixelType

Sample Snippet

SpatialReference

SpatialReference of the Raster.

ISpatialReference SpatialReference { get; set; }

Width in pixels.

int Width { get; set; }
